title: INTEGRATED HEALTH CLINICS - 211info
text: INTEGRATED HEALTH CLINICS EUGENE INTEGRATED HEALTH CLINICS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides individual, group, and family counseling for outpatient substance use disorder treatment, specializing in methadone and suboxone maintenance, as well as DUII education and rehabilitation. Coordinates care with primary care physicians, social services, and court systems, and provides monthly progress reports to courts or other referral sources. Also offers a range of support services, including tuberculosis testing, HIV testing, hepatitis C education, and medication monitoring. 715 Lincoln Street Eugene, OR 97401 Eligibility: Age 18 and older Hours: Monday-Friday 5:30am-2:30pm, Saturday 7am-9:30am Email (541) 344-3574 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 344-3574 Eugene Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for appointment FEES: Accepts Oregon Health Plan. Monthly fee depending on treatment needs. Sliding scale fee available. Can provide itemized statements to submit to other private insurance companies. DOCUMENTS: State ID card LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Lane County TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Located on corner of 7th and Lincoln. LTD bus #51 stops nearby. Services: Comprehensive Outpatient Substance Use Disorder Treatment Detoxification DUI Offender Programs Medication Assisted Maintenance Treatment for Substance Use Disorders If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
